overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a foggy industrial district in a historical American city (Saint Denis from Red Dead Redemption 2). The player moves from a poster-covered wall past horse-drawn carriages and brick warehouses toward a large electric company building with prominent smokestacks, continuing down a cobblestone street toward an archway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk next to commercial building

events.description: camera pulls back from close-up of poster board to reveal street view with horse-drawn carriage

agents.ego_description: moving along the building wall past posters and yellow-framed windows

entered.detail: weathered wooden pole covered with vintage advertisements and flyers
large window with ornate yellow trim on stone building facade
black wooden carriage with large spoked wheels parked at the curb
striped red and white canvas awning extending over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a close-up of a poster-covered wooden board before the camera pulls back to reveal a first-person perspective walking along a covered sidewalk. The player moves past a building with distinctive yellow window frames, approaching a horse-drawn carriage parked under a red striped awning.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway transitioning to open street

events.description: player moves from covered sidewalk to edge of cobblestone street
industrial smokestacks become visible through the haze in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking under the awnings and passing pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: man in dark coat and hat standing with arms crossed near the building entrance

entered.detail: tall red brick wall with ivy growing at the base
ornate black iron lamppost with curved top
tall factory chimneys emitting smoke into the hazy sky

segments.scene_description: Walking under the red awnings, the player moves along the cobblestone edge of the street. A man in a dark coat stands near the building entrance as industrial smokestacks become visible through the morning haze. The camera passes from the sheltered walkway toward the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial street with factory buildings

events.description: the large electric company building becomes the dominant feature ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the cobblestone street toward the industrial complex

notable_agents.action: group of workers in overalls leaning against the brick wall

entered.detail: large two-story industrial building with prominent rooftop signage reading 'THE LANK ELECTRIC COMPANY'
black iron fence running along the left side of the street
stack of wooden barrels and crates outside the warehouse

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide cobblestone street lined with brick warehouses. Workers in overalls stand against the walls smoking as the player approaches the prominent Lank Electric Company building. Overhead power lines crisscross between industrial smokestacks in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial plaza in front of electric company

events.description: player turns right to pass the corner of the electric company building

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the electric company building while navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: worker in denim overalls and cap walking toward the camera then stepping aside

entered.detail: tall wooden water tower on stilts visible behind the buildings

segments.scene_description: Passing the Lank Electric Company building on the left, the player moves through an open industrial area. A worker in overalls walks past as the camera turns right, revealing a water tower in the distance. The street transitions from cobblestone to packed dirt.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial access road leading to city archway

events.description: horse-drawn carriage moves ahead of the player toward the archway

agents.ego_description: following a horse-drawn carriage down the dirt road toward the Saint Denis archway

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two occupants moving away from camera toward the archway

entered.detail: ornate iron archway spanning the street with 'SAINT DENIS' lettering

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player walking down a narrower dirt road between brick warehouses, following a horse-drawn carriage toward the ornate Saint Denis archway. The industrial smokestacks fade behind as the camera approaches the entrance to the city proper.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban sidewalk through a hazy industrial district toward a grand city entrance. It begins with a close-up of a poster-covered wooden board before pulling back to move past yellow window frames and a horse-drawn carriage parked under red striped awnings. As the camera leaves the sheltered walkway, the scene opens onto a wide cobblestone street where industrial smokestacks emerge through the morning haze and workers in overalls lean against brick warehouses. The perspective then passes the Lank Electric Company building and shifts from cobblestone to packed dirt, turning right to reveal a distant water tower. Finally, the camera follows a carriage down a narrow dirt road between warehouses, leaving the smokestacks behind as it approaches the ornate Saint Denis archway.
